scripts.pr21:reset: pnpm -C apps/api db:reset --yes && pnpm -C packages/contracts build
scripts.pr21:verify:static: pnpm -C packages/contracts build && pnpm -C apps/fe lint && pnpm -C apps/fe typecheck && pnpm -C apps/fe build && pnpm -C apps/api typecheck && pnpm -C apps/api build
scripts.pr21:verify:smokes: pnpm -C apps/api smoke:full && pnpm -C apps/api smoke:negative && pnpm -C apps/api smoke:realtime && pnpm -C apps/api smoke:oversell
